category.scope_note: Electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Singapore, covering electrical safety, EMC, market access, noise, restricted substances, and battery requirements.

target_market_label.zh: 新加坡（EMA / 企业发展局）
target_market_label.zht: 新加坡（EMA / 企業發展局）

title.en: China-to-Singapore Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入新加坡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入新加坡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Singapore requirements: the SAFETY Mark Controlled Goods scheme administered by Enterprise Singapore, SS/IEC 62841 safety standards, IMDA radio registration for cordless tools, electrical and EMC expectations, restricted substances, and battery handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与新加坡要求差距对照：企业发展局管理的 SAFETY Mark 受控产品计划、SS/IEC 62841 安全标准、无绳工具的 IMDA 无线电注册、电气与电磁兼容预期、限用物质及电池处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與新加坡要求差距對照：企業發展局管理的 SAFETY Mark 受控產品計劃、SS/IEC 62841 安全標準、無繩工具的 IMDA 無線電註冊、電氣與電磁相容預期、限用物質及電池處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Singapore law, the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme, SS standards, IMDA radio obligations, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行新加坡法律、《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》、SS 标准、IMDA 无线电义务及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行新加坡法律、《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》、SS 標準、IMDA 無線電義務及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Singapore, the key access question is whether the item is a Controlled Good under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme administered by Enterprise Singapore; household-type tools in scope need a SAFETY Mark obtained through a Singapore-based Registered Supplier, while industrial tools are generally outside the controlled-goods list. SS/IEC 62841 is the common safety basis, cordless radio-enabled tools require IMDA registration, and Singapore has no equivalent to the EU outdoor-noise marking regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的电动工具进入新加坡，关键准入问题是该产品是否属于企业发展局管理的《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》下的受控产品；属于范围内的家用类工具需通过新加坡本地注册供应商取得 SAFETY Mark，而工业工具一般不在受控产品清单内。SS/IEC 62841 是常用安全依据，具备无线电功能的无绳工具需 IMDA 注册，新加坡没有与欧盟户外噪声标识制度对应的强制要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的電動工具進入新加坡，關鍵准入問題是該產品是否屬於企業發展局管理的《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》下的受控產品；屬於範圍內的家用類工具需透過新加坡本地註冊供應商取得 SAFETY Mark，而工業工具一般不在受控產品清單內。SS/IEC 62841 是常用安全依據，具備無線電功能的無繩工具需 IMDA 註冊，新加坡沒有與歐盟戶外噪聲標識制度對應的強制要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal source preferred.
